song.title: Blest be the Tie that Binds
song.lyrics: [v1] Blest be the tie that binds Our hearts in Christian love; The fellowship our spirit finds Is like to that above [v2] Before our Fathers throne, We pour our ardent prayers; Our fears, our hopes, our aims are one - Our comforts and our cares. [v3] We share our mutual woes; Our mutual burdens bear; And often for each other flows The sympathizing tear. [v4] When we assunder part, It gives us inward pain; But we shall still be joined in heart, And hope to meet again. [v5] From sorrow, toil, and pain And sin we shall be free; And perfect love and oneness reign Through all eternity.
